title: Stijnmarsepijn's Vanilla PvP pack
description: Perfect for sweaty duels and peformance
body:
This modpack is made for players who love vanilla PvP but want it to feel cleaner, smoother, and way less chaotic. Everything is focused on performance, visibility, and comfort during fights, without turning Minecraft into something unrecognizable. You’ll get better FPS thanks to mods like Sodium, Lithium, Krypton, and ImmediatelyFast, so combat stays smooth even on busy servers.

For the PvP side, smart quality of life mods like Centered Crosshair, Crosshair Indicator, and Ukus Armor HUD help you stay locked in during every duel. BetterF3 and ShulkerBoxTooltip make important info easier to read, which is super handy during practice or scrims. With EntityCulling and MoreCulling, your game only renders what really matters, cutting down on lag and visual noise.

Visually, everything stays close to vanilla, just sharper and more PvP-friendly. Think smaller totems, less fire on your screen, and fewer particles, so your opponent never disappears in the chaos. No weird textures, no pay-to-win vibes, just fair PvP. This pack is perfect for sword fights, crystal PvP, UHC, and SMP battles. Install it, launch the game, and you’re instantly ready to fight. Clean, simple, and built to win.
